results.title: Grocery Store Locator | Quality Products Low Prices | Lidl US
results.snippet: So you've heard about us, but wonder where to find us? Use our grocery store locator to find a Lidl near you. Hello, affordable high-quality groceries.

results.title: Store Finder - Lidl US
results.snippet: Search by your Zip Code or City to find your nearest Lidl and start saving!

results.title: Store Finder - Lidl GB
results.snippet: Pop your postcode into the box and click your nearest store to see opening times and all the offers within grabbing distance. Never miss another offer!

results.title: LIDL - Store Locator & Hours
results.snippet: The operating hours for the Lidl stores are usually from 8 AM to 9 PM, but we advise you to first check the precise hours using our store locator before visiting.

results.title: Who we are. What drives us. - Lidl
results.snippet: Lidl currently operates around 12,900 stores across 32 countries, offering high-quality food and non-food products at the best price. Our map connects you directly to our national websites, providing easy …

results.title: Food, Non-food, Wine and Recipes | Lidl GB
results.snippet: Explore our range of high quality fresh food & product offers. Enjoy great prices & latest deals in store. Shop today & use your Lidl Plus app.
